creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Hi, 

I've installed the Beta7 on FreeBSD 4.4 and have come across 
a strange problem: 
When I start netsaint, it seems the plugins for the checks I defined 
for the hosts are not found. 
Instead of looking for /usr/local/libexec/netsaint/_the_check_, I get 
a message on the console trying to access /_the_check. 

As if the $USER1-macro was not read. 

When I go to the host and force a re-check, it finds the plugin and 
the check succeeds. 

Does anybody have an idea why this could happen ? 
Or even better, how to solve it ?

How-To-Repeat: Always happens.
